root_text.an8.1:1.2: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
root_text.an8.1:2.1: “Mettāya, bhikkhave, cetovimuttiyā āsevitāya bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya aṭṭhānisaṁsā pāṭikaṅkhā.
root_text.an8.1:2.3: Sukhaṁ supati, sukhaṁ paṭibujjhati, na pāpakaṁ supinaṁ passati, manussānaṁ piyo hoti, amanussānaṁ piyo hoti, devatā rakkhanti, nāssa aggi vā visaṁ vā satthaṁ vā kamati, uttariṁ appaṭivijjhanto brahmalokūpago hoti.
root_text.an8.1:2.4: Mettāya, bhikkhave, cetovimuttiyā āsevitāya bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya ime aṭṭhānisaṁsā pāṭikaṅkhāti.

translation_text.an8.1:1.2: At one time the Buddha was staying near Sāvatthī in Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
translation_text.an8.1:1.3: There the Buddha addressed the mendicants,
translation_text.an8.1:2.1: “Mendicants, you can expect eight benefits when the heart’s release by love has been cultivated, developed, and practiced, made a vehicle and a basis, kept up, consolidated, and properly implemented.
translation_text.an8.1:2.3: You sleep at ease. You wake happily. You don’t have bad dreams. Humans love you. Non-humans love you. Deities protect you. You can’t be harmed by fire, poison, or blade. If you don’t reach any higher, you’ll be reborn in a realm of divinity.
translation_text.an8.1:2.4: You can expect these eight benefits when the heart’s release by love has been cultivated, developed, and practiced, made a vehicle and a basis, kept up, consolidated, and properly implemented.
translation_text.an8.1:4.1: Loving just one creature with a hateless heart
translation_text.an8.1:4.4: a noble one creates abundant merit.
translation_text.an8.1:5.1: The royal potentates conquered this land
translation_text.an8.1:5.4: the sacrifices of the ‘casting of the yoke-pin’, <j>the ‘royal soma drinking’, and the ‘unimpeded’.
translation_text.an8.1:6.1: These are not worth a sixteenth part
translation_text.an8.1:6.2: of the mind developed with love,
translation_text.an8.1:6.3: as all the constellations of stars
translation_text.an8.1:6.4: aren’t worth a sixteenth part of the moon’s light.
translation_text.an8.1:7.1: Don’t kill or cause others to kill,
translation_text.an8.1:7.2: don’t conquer or encourage others to conquer,
translation_text.an8.1:7.3: with love for all sentient beings,
translation_text.an8.1:7.4: you’ll have no enmity for anyone.”

variant_text.an8.1:6.4: soḷasiṁ → ayaṁ pādo sya-all, pts1ed potthakesu

reference_text.an8.1:1.1: bj22.2, csp1ed17.1, csp2ed17.1, dr23.165, ms17A8_2, msdiv1, ndp3.270, pts-vp-pli4.150, cck23.2.1, vri39.1
